name: clean application code is allowed through the pre-write governor
command: printf '%s' '{"tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"ok.ts","content":"const y: number = 1;\n"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && echo clean-app-allowed 1>&2
